hero.headline: Architecting autonomous systems.
hero.subheadline: AI infrastructure, automation orchestration, and industrial intelligence. Built for the future, deployed today.

systems.label: Architecture
systems.title: Systems Overview
systems.description: Core intelligence layers, protocol fabrics, and operational runtimes that power autonomous infrastructure.
systems.showcaseDescription: Operational architecture, protocol topologies and intelligence flows represented as living system maps.
notes: Protocol-first orchestration through MCP gateway and AURA arbitration.
Graph memory as persistent operational context for multi-agent continuity.
Runtime feedback loops feeding orchestration and reliability policies.
Infrastructure modeled as composable intelligence modules, not isolated apps.

labs.labsDescription: From portfolio to platform: live operational modules showcasing AI products as dynamic systems.

infrastructure.commandCenterDescription: Operational runtime visibility across containers, deployments, logs and MCP node health.

github.description: Live repository analytics, commit activity, and deployment telemetry.
github.integrationDescription: GitHub transformed into a dynamic backend for activity intelligence, releases, deployments and repository evolution.

about.label: Identity
about.title: About
about.description: Systems architect specializing in AI infrastructure, multi-agent orchestration, and graph memory systems.
about.aboutDescription: Building the operational core of next-generation AI products, from architecture to execution.
about.narrative: This platform is my live architecture workspace: a place where AI systems, orchestration layers, and automation infrastructures are designed, tested, and operationalized. The goal is not to ship isolated demos, but to construct modular ecosystems that learn, adapt, and compound in value.

focusAreas.title: Systems Thinking
focusAreas.description: Architecture first, implementation second: every system is built to survive complexity.
